overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dark concrete underpass lined with vending machines and neon signs, transitioning to an industrial courtyard with trash piles, burning tires, and squatters. The scene features a dystopian cyberpunk aesthetic with mixed artificial and natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with vending machines and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark concrete underpass toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with weathered texture forming the corridor sides
large white painted text reading SECTOR on the left wall
row of illuminated arcade and vending machines with colorful displays
glowing digital posters and neon signs on the right wall
low concrete seating platforms in the middle of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark, enclosed concrete underpass illuminated by neon signs and vending machines. The corridor features graffiti reading SECTOR on the left wall and concrete benches in the center, with a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: squatter settlement area under the overpass

events.description: turns right into a side alcove of the underpass where squatters have set up cardboard mats

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking past a group of squatters sitting on cardboard mats with their belongings

notable_agents.action: two squatters sitting on cardboard mats with scattered belongings and bags

entered.detail: yellow rectangular sign with black text reading NO ENTRY suspended from ceiling
closed metal roll-up security door at the end of the alcove
makeshift living area with cardboard mats, blankets, and scattered personal items

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a side alcove beneath the overpass where squatters have established a makeshift settlement with cardboard mats and belongings. A yellow NO ENTRY sign hangs above as the player passes the sitting figures and approaches a metal shutter door.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to industrial courtyard

events.description: exits the underpass through a metal gate into an industrial courtyard with visible sky above
approaches a burning tire fire with thick black smoke rising into the air

agents.ego_description: walking out of the underpass and approaching a character standing near a burning fire in the industrial courtyard

notable_agents.action: character in a hoodie with pink sleeves standing near the burning tire fire

entered.detail: large metal mesh gate marking the transition from indoor to outdoor space
large mounds of garbage bags piled against the left wall
pile of tires burning with orange flames and thick black smoke
large rusted metal pipes running along the walls and ceiling
metal mesh flooring with visible gaps covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass through a metal gate into a semi-covered industrial courtyard. Large piles of blue trash bags line the left wall while burning tires create thick smoke ahead. A character in a hoodie stands near the fire on the metal grating floor as industrial pipes run overhead.

events.description: turns slightly left and approaches a metal staircase leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial courtyard past graffiti-covered walls and approaching a metal staircase

entered.detail: metal staircase with railings leading up to a higher level
large colorful graffiti art featuring a skull with yellow and blue paint
tall industrial concrete walls enclosing the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the industrial courtyard, passing colorful skull graffiti on the left wall. The burning fire and character fall behind as the player approaches a metal staircase leading upward, with natural light filtering down from above and trash piles visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit concrete underpass into a gritty, open-air industrial courtyard. It begins by moving through a dark corridor lined with vending machines and graffiti, heading toward a bright exit. As the camera veers right into a side alcove, the environment shifts to a makeshift squatter settlement filled with cardboard mats and belongings beneath a yellow warning sign. The scene then opens up as the camera passes through a metal gate into a semi-covered courtyard, where the artificial neon glow is replaced by thick smoke from burning tires and the sight of industrial pipes overhead. Finally, the camera moves past colorful skull graffiti and leaves the fire behind, advancing toward a metal staircase as natural light filters down from above.
